title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
